title: HugMe
body:
**_Use a hug ticket on your friend to initiate a hug request_**

**This mod requires [playerAnimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator) which you can download from [here](https://maven.kosmx.dev/dev/kosmx/player-anim/player-animation-lib-forge/1.0.2-rc1%2B1.21/player-animation-lib-forge-1.0.2-rc1%2B1.21.jar)**
